title: Prediction market platform Kalshi partners with luxury watch marketplace Bezel to launch event contracts tied to high-end watches
message_html: Prediction market platform Kalshi partners with luxury watch marketplace Bezel to launch event contracts tied to high-end watches ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to Bloomberg, prediction market platform Kalshi is partnering with luxury watch marketplace Bezel to launch event contracts tied to high-end watches.
